{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Fisher's
| introduced = cradle-06-underlord
}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Fisher's]] is a location where the group plans to meet.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c5">''Underlord'', chapter 5</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
